name: talking-avatars-kit
description: Talking head avatars with real-time lipsync — GLBs, FFT-based viseme detector, multi-provider TTS (Kokoro local, Google cloud), and the conversion pipeline.

scripts._comment: This kit is meant to be lifted into your project, not installed as a package. Use the deps below as the install list for your own package.json. The pipeline has its own package.json under pipeline/.
scripts.convert-avatars: cd pipeline && npm install && npm run convert

peerDependencies._comment: What the client/ files expect to be available in your bundler.

optionalDependencies._comment_kokoro: Only needed if you use the Kokoro provider in server/.
optionalDependencies._comment_express: Only needed if you use server/ttsRoute.js as-is.
